user_requirement: 把这个数据存储到sqllite数据库里面 就是后端调用产生的数据

relevant_files: doc/添加SQLite存储/01_需求规格说明书.md
api_contracts: GET /api/events/:taskId -> SSE stream sourced from EventBus.subscribeByTask(taskId)
critical_logic: Task lifecycle is currently in-memory only: TaskManager keeps Map<string, TaskContext>; list/detail iterate that Map (packages/server/src/services/task-manager.ts:44).

Pipeline state persistence is currently filesystem JSON only: PipelineStateMachine calls BlackboardManager.write(state) on advance/updatePhase/setCurrentPhaseIndex (packages/server/src/core/state-machine.ts:81, packages/server/src/core/state-machine.ts:118).

Blackboard JSON generation currently hard-resets global_context to null on every write (packages/server/src/core/blackboard.ts:86). This conflicts with Phase gateCondition 'global_context 已设置' (packages/server/src/pipeline/categories.ts:78).

SSE is process-local only: PipelineRunner emits SSEEvent via EventBus.emit; EventBus is a thin EventEmitter wrapper, no storage, no replay (packages/server/src/utils/event-bus.ts:21, packages/server/src/routes/events.ts:20).

PipelineStatus is not part of PipelineState; it lives only in TaskContext and is mutated in TaskManager.startPipeline()/abortPipeline() and PipelineRunner bindings setPipelineStatus (packages/server/src/services/task-manager.ts:38, packages/server/src/services/task-manager.ts:165).

Phase runtime fields written by PipelineRunner -> PipelineStateMachine.updatePhase(...) include arrays (artifacts/changedFiles/commandsExecuted) that must be persisted as JSON text in SQLite per spec (packages/server/src/pipeline/runner.ts:318).

Event-to-phase association exists only inside SSEEvent.data; persistent sse_events.phase_id must be extracted (e.g., data.phaseId) and stored redundantly for indexing (doc/添加SQLite存储/01_需求规格说明书.md:72).
global_context.downstream_prompt:
Goal: implement a complete SQLite persistence layer (better-sqlite3) for Orchestrator backend data: tasks, phases, sse_events, blackboard_snapshots. Do NOT simplify; treat DB as source of truth for list/detail, and ensure strict SSE replay ordering.

A) Current integration points (must inject here):
1) Task creation: packages/server/src/services/task-manager.ts:53 -> after generateTaskId + stateMachine init. Replace filesystem-only blackboard.initialize with DB-backed create flow: insert tasks row (pipeline_status=IDLE, current_phase_index=0, current_phase_id=phase defs[0].phaseId), upsert phases rows for all phase definitions, persist blackboard latest JSON and snapshot(version=1, reason='initialize').
2) Task listing/detail: packages/server/src/services/task-manager.ts:96 and :124 must query SQLite instead of iterating in-memory Map. Keep Map only as runtime cache for active runners. completedPhases should come from phases aggregation in DB.
3) PipelineStatus transitions: packages/server/src/services/task-manager.ts:165 (startPipeline), :225 (abortPipeline), and the completion/failure callbacks in startPipeline() must also update tasks.pipeline_status in SQLite. Also ensure PipelineRunnerBindings.setPipelineStatus persists status changes (RUNNING <-> PAUSED_FOR_REVIEW).
4) Phase runtime changes: packages/server/src/core/state-machine.ts:81 (advance), :103 (setCurrentPhaseIndex), :118 (updatePhase) currently call BlackboardManager.write(). Replace/augment this so EVERY state mutation results in (i) tasks.updated_at/current_phase_index/current_phase_id update, (ii) phases upsert for the affected phase(s) (or full refresh), (iii) blackboard latest JSON update, (iv) blackboard_snapshots insert with monotonically increasing version and a reason string.
5) SSE persistence: packages/server/src/utils/event-bus.ts:21 emit(event) is the single choke point for all SSE from PipelineRunner. Inject an SSEEventsRepository so emit() appends to sse_events with a per-task strictly increasing seq before publishing to EventEmitter. (Optionally extend SSEEvent in shared types to include seq for client replay; otherwise keep seq DB-only for replay endpoints.)
6) SSE replay endpoint: packages/server/src/routes/events.ts should be extended (new route) to support replay by seq: GET /api/events/:taskId/replay?afterSeq=N (or use Last-Event-ID). It must read sse_events ordered by seq and return JSON array (or emit as SSE).

B) Schema requirements (must cover all 4 tables):
- tasks: fields from spec + (recommended) blackboard_latest_json TEXT NOT NULL, blackboard_version INTEGER NOT NULL, last_event_seq INTEGER NOT NULL for atomic seq generation.
- phases: UNIQUE(task_id, phase_id), store arrays as JSON text columns.
- sse_events: UNIQUE(task_id, seq), store data_json, plus redundant columns phase_id/level/agent/message when available.
- blackboard_snapshots: UNIQUE(task_id, version), store blackboard_json + reason + created_at.
Enable foreign keys and ON DELETE CASCADE. Add suggested indexes from spec.

C) Critical design constraints (do this carefully):
- Preserve global_context: current BlackboardManager.stateToBlackboard() overwrites global_context=null on every write. In the DB design, blackboard persistence MUST merge existing global_context forward (read latest JSON, keep global_context unless explicitly updated). Otherwise phase_1 gateCondition can never be satisfied and context will be lost.
- Transactions: every logical state change should be persisted atomically (tasks + phases + blackboard latest + snapshot) to avoid partial writes. Use better-sqlite3 transactions + prepared statements.
- SSE seq monotonicity: implement per-task seq allocation atomically (recommended: tasks.last_event_seq increment with UPDATE ... RETURNING in a transaction, then insert sse_events with that seq).
- Performance: use WAL mode, busy_timeout, and prepared statements. Consider snapshot volume; still implement full snapshots (complete system), but allow future config to limit snapshot frequency.

D) Files to create (server package):
- packages/server/src/db/database.ts (better-sqlite3 connection, PRAGMA setup, migration runner)
- packages/server/src/db/schema.sql (or packages/server/src/db/migrations/001_init.sql) with the 4 tables + indexes
- packages/server/src/db/repositories/tasks-repository.ts
- packages/server/src/db/repositories/phases-repository.ts
- packages/server/src/db/repositories/sse-events-repository.ts
- packages/server/src/db/repositories/blackboard-snapshots-repository.ts
- packages/server/src/db/unit-of-work.ts (optional transaction boundary helper)
- packages/server/src/db/types.ts (row types + JSON parse helpers)

E) Files to modify (server + shared likely):
- packages/server/src/index.ts (instantiate DB + repositories; inject into TaskManager and EventBus)
- packages/server/src/services/task-manager.ts (switch list/detail/delete/create/start/abort/review to DB-backed; keep runtime Map only for active runners)
- packages/server/src/core/state-machine.ts (replace blackboard.write side-effects with persistence interface that writes to DB)
- packages/server/src/core/blackboard.ts (either replaced by DB-backed store or refactored into merge-preserving serializer; MUST NOT null out global_context)
- packages/server/src/utils/event-bus.ts (persist events before emit)
- packages/server/src/routes/events.ts (add replay endpoint; optionally support Last-Event-ID)
- packages/shared/src/types/events.ts (optional: add seq field for SSEEvent)
- packages/shared/src/types/agent-result.ts + pipeline runner/state machine (optional: allow context_builder to write global_context into blackboard via structured result)

F) Testing plan (should be implemented later):
- Repository unit tests (vitest) verifying: task create/upsert, phases unique constraint, cascade delete, snapshot version monotonicity, SSE seq monotonicity under rapid emits.
- Integration test for list/detail returning persisted data after TaskManager Map cleared (simulate restart).
